content:
# Thicken Time

**Summary**: The time required for the cement slurry to reach a specific consistency (e.g., 100 Bc).

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-adjei|Adjei, 2022]] measured thickening times to ensure pumpability during well operations.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-adjei|Adjei, 2022]] Determines the window of time available for pumping and placement in the wellbore.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-adjei|Adjei, 2022]] Measured using a Grace atmospheric consistometer.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The PM_S_4 system never showed any sign of thickening even at 3 hours and 30 minutes. ([[2022-adjei|Adjei, 2022, p. 156]])
